pi_items.source: Found in scripts/setup_hec_ras.sh script configuring the environment paths.
Found in tasks/compute_hydraulic_geometry/export_result.sh which looks for this file.
Found in tasks/compute_hydraulic_geometry/export_result.sh which looks for this file.
Task description in task.json mandates 0.5-ft elevation increments.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on the real-world 'Muncie' HEC-RAS example dataset (White River, Indiana). The most upstream cross-section has a River Station (RS) identifier of '15696.24'. Its geometry data contains 134 station-elevation points, with a thalweg (minimum) elevation of 936.99 ft and a maximum ground elevation of 963.04 ft. This geometry data is found within 'Muncie.p04.tmp.hdf'. Output files must be placed in '/home/ga/Documents/hec_ras_results/'.
